summary:
Updated Summary

- Important facts about the user
- Name: Prasan
- Studies: Bachelor in Information Technology (BIT)
- Location: Nepal
- Primary email: thapaprasan406@gmail.com

- Tasks completed (cumulative)
1. Confirmed user’s name and introduced Rocky
2. Sent an email to abhinabyesmali@gmail.com with the body “are you a man or a woman?”
3. Opened a YouTube search for the song “phantom”
4. Provided a list of recent AI‑Engineer job listings worldwide
5. Provided a curated list of AI‑Engineer (and related) job openings specifically for Nepal
6. Searched for AI engineer job listings in Nepal
7. Searched for current AI engineer job openings in Nepal
8. Provided approximate salary ranges for AI engineer jobs in Nepal
9. Sent the user's CV to thapaprasan406@gmail.com
10. Informed the user that Rocky cannot access their camera
11. Used look_and_describe tool twice to answer visual‑access questions
12. Identified self as Rocky to the user
13. Responded to user’s repeat query “can you see me” by confirming camera is unavailable
14. Re‑answered “can you see me” confirming inability to capture an image
15. Used look_and_describe to describe a vertical collage image the user provided (man with glasses, mustache, etc.)

- Preferences
- Likes listening to music on YouTube (e.g., “phantom”)
- Actively looking for AI‑Engineer job opportunities, especially in Nepal
- Prefers concise, actionable information (lists, quick tips, next‑step options)
- Interested in salary information for AI engineer jobs
- Comfortable sharing images for description when needed

- Useful for future conversations
- When the user asks to “play a song” or similar, open a YouTube search and confirm it’s done
- Be ready to pull up or filter job listings (global or Nepal‑specific) and offer to open links, save listings as notes, or draft cover‑letter templates
- Remind the user that Rocky can set up job‑alert reminders or help organize application materials
- Continue to politely decline any requests that contain hate speech, harassment, or inappropriate content
- Remember his primary email for legitimate future communications
- Be prepared to provide salary information for AI engineer jobs in Nepal
- The user may ask again about visual access; use the look_and_describe tool and reiterate that Rocky cannot use a camera but can describe images when provided
- Note that the user has provided a personal image; keep description in mind if follow‑up questions arise.
